# Issue Template

Use this structure when creating or grooming issues. Keep it tight.

```markdown
## Context

<What's the problem or opportunity? Why now? Link any related issues/PRs.>

## Proposed approach

<Optional. The intended direction, if known. Omit for pure bug reports.>

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] <Observable, testable outcome 1>
- [ ] <Observable, testable outcome 2>

## Links

- Related: #
- Depends on: #
```

Guidelines:

- **Title:** imperative and specific — "Add retry to carrier lookup", not "carrier bug".
- **Acceptance criteria** are mandatory for an issue to be Ready.
- Apply labels on creation: one Type, one Priority, ≥1 Area.
- Search for duplicates before creating; link instead of duplicating.
